prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a widely used financial model for stock price movements. The current price of SCHW ($92.75) serves as the starting point. For the 18-day prediction period, an annual drift (expected return) of 7% and an annual volatility of 30% were assumed, reflecting typical market returns and SCHW's historical volatility. Using these parameters, the model calculates the median expected price (point estimate) and constructs confidence intervals by determining the corresponding percentiles of the log-normal distribution that stock prices are assumed to follow under GBM.
